entity.summary: Polygon ecosystem decentralized exchange application represented by a dedicated trading interface and independent DEX registry entries.
entity.notes: The dedicated GT3 application endpoint is reachable. Exchange identity and Polygon DEX classification are independently corroborated by CoinGecko and DefiLlama candidate sources; public first-party documentation is limited, so confidence remains medium.

evidence.title: GT3 official application
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party GT3 application endpoint is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: GT3 exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies GT3 under the dapp.gt3.finance domain.

evidence.title: GT3 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently classifies GT3 as a Polygon decentralized exchange, corroborating the dedicated application endpoint.
